title: SACRAMENTO – In an effort to protect the California Coast, the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee unanimously passed AB 72 authored by Assemblywoman Cottie Petrie-Norris.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Innovative, nature-based solutions exist to protect the California coast from sea-level rise.",
    "Coastal adaptation initiatives are one of the most promising strategies to combat the threat of sea-level rise, according to scientists.",
    "Replacing shoreline armoring with living shorelines is one method of coastal adaptation.",
    "Creating and rehabilitating tidal marshes can buffer increasing tides.",
    "Natural breakwaters made of oysters can dissipate wave action and protect shorelines."
  ]
}
```
